name: Italian Cabbage Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Cooked sausage or ham diced
recipeInstructions: This is a hearty soup, perfect for a cold day. In a heavy Dutch oven, sauté garlic, sage, and pancetta in olive oil until fragrant. Add the tomatoes and chicken broth; bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer. Mash half of the beans with a fork and stir into the soup. Reserve the remaining beans. Add the cabbage and cook for 1 hour or until very soft. Return the reserved beans and add the cooked sausage or ham. Slowly incorporate the cornmeal, stirring constantly to prevent lumps, until the soup thickens. Serve with crusty Italian bread, a green salad, and a light red fruity wine.
